transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a compensation claim
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the ticket
transcript.text: Rourke Wexleigh
Thanks, **Rourke**! Could you also share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
EEHSN4
Just to confirm — **first name Rourke**, **last name Wexleigh**, **booking reference EEHSN4** — is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming all the details are correct
transcript.text: Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YYZ → TLV · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Other
Could you let me know the **specific country** where your reimbursement would be deposited?

transcript.note: Providing my country of residence as Israel
transcript.text: Israel

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the decision - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed 4 hours!

I'm sorry about that, Rourke — I can hear the frustration, and a 4-hour delay is genuinely disruptive.

To help me understand what happened, could you tell me a bit more about the delay — for example, **what caused it**, if you were told?

transcript.note: Expressing that I don't know the cause but asserting my right to compensation
transcript.text: I wasn't told what caused it. I just know my flight was delayed 4 hours and I want the compensation I'm entitled to
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I already told you I'm the passenger. Can you please review my claim properly?
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
This is ridiculous. I already went through this whole process and you denied my claim with no proper explanation. Can I speak to a human agent?
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Firmly requesting human agent as the bot is stuck in a loop
transcript.text: I want to speak to a human agent. This bot is not working properly.

I'm sorry you've had a frustrating experience. I'll connect you with a live agent right away.

In the meantime, you can also reach our team directly at **1-888-247-2262**, available **24/7**.

transcript.note: Bot has escalated to human agent - this is a final outcome (handed to agent)
transcript.text: Thank you
Thank you — I hope our team gets everything sorted for you quickly. Take care!

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot did reach a determination and rendered a NOT_ELIGIBLE decision for the claim, which matches the expected outcome. The bot stated: "However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight." No compensation amount was offered, which is correct for a NOT_ELIGIBLE case. Although the bot's explanation was inadequate ("the reason is: Your flight was disrupted") and it subsequently looped when challenged by the passenger, the FINAL outcome that was rendered was NOT_ELIGIBLE with no compensation amount. This matches the expected verdict of NOT_ELIGIBLE with n/a amount. The escalation to a human agent occurred after the determination was made, so the bot did reach a determination before escalating.
